scripts.dev: concurrently -n frameworks,app "pnpm run dev:frameworks" "pnpm run dev:app"
scripts.dev:frameworks: concurrently -n react,vue,svelte,solid,angular,qwik,astro "pnpm run dev:react" "pnpm run dev:vue" "pnpm run dev:svelte" "pnpm run dev:solid" "pnpm run dev:angular" "pnpm run dev:qwik" "pnpm run dev:astro"
scripts.dev:app: wait-on tcp:6006 tcp:6007 tcp:6008 tcp:6009 tcp:6010 tcp:6011 tcp:6012 && pnpm run storybook
